ID: US-SLD-036
Title: Slides FE/BE Integration and Regression Suite
Status: Missing
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As a QA lead
I want an end-to-end regression suite for slide frontend/backend flows
So new editor capabilities ship with defensible reliability evidence

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Automated tests cover create/edit/save/autosave/load flows for slides.
- [ ] Automated tests cover template duplication and library operations.
- [ ] Automated tests cover HTML import plus export paths (including expected warning/failure branches).
- [ ] CI executes slides integration coverage and fails on FE/BE contract regressions.
